---
title: "DATA550 Final Project Report"
author: "Lidong Yu"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

## Introduction

This is a reproducible report generated using Docker.

## Simple Analysis

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(cars)
```
